name: studio.update_settings
description: Update site-level settings on Actium Studio: locale, timezone, analytics IDs, feature toggles. Opt-in skill — operator acknowledgement required per work-r1-actium-studio-skills.md §1.1.
whenToUse: Operator explicitly asked to change site-wide locale, timezone, analytics ID, or a specific feature flag and the change is reviewed.
Scripted initialization: post-scaffold setup applies a known-good settings profile captured from a template site.
Analytics cutover: swap analytics_id after a provider migration — confirmed with the operator first.
whenNotToUse: No explicit operator confirm:true — this skill gates destructive config changes and must not fire implicitly.
Caller is adjusting per-page SEO — that's studio.update_page, not settings.
Caller wants theme tokens (colors, fonts) — use studio.update_theme_tokens; settings and theme are separate surfaces.
